LanguageData.Ammo_RPG7Grenade_HEAT.label: RPG-7 grenade (HEAT)
LanguageData.Ammo_RPG7Grenade_HEAT.description: Rocket-propelled missile designed for the ML-77. After being fired a rocket motor kicks in to propel the grenade further.
LanguageData.Ammo_RPG7Grenade_Thermobaric.label: RPG-7 grenade (Thermobaric)
LanguageData.Ammo_RPG7Grenade_Thermobaric.description: Rocket-propelled missile designed for the ML-77. After being fired a rocket motor kicks in to propel the grenade further.
LanguageData.Ammo_RPG7Grenade_Frag.label: RPG-7 grenade (Frag)
LanguageData.Ammo_RPG7Grenade_Frag.description: Rocket-propelled missile designed for the ML-77. After being fired a rocket motor kicks in to propel the grenade further.
LanguageData.Bullet_RPG7Grenade_HEAT.label: RPG-7 grenade (HEAT)
LanguageData.Bullet_RPG7Grenade_Thermobaric.label: RPG-7 grenade (Thermobaric)
LanguageData.Bullet_RPG7Grenade_Frag.label: RPG-7 grenade (Frag)
